options.responseData: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: $('Build Response').first().json.ok, lead_id: $('Build Response').first().json.lead_id, context: $('Build Response').first().json.context, scripts: $('Build Response').first().json.scripts, error: $('Build Response').first().json.error || null }) }}

nodes.name: Script Matcher Webhook (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Body: { lead_id (uuid), stage_hint (string, optional: discovery|objection|closing|followup), situation_hint (free text, optional), token (dashboard or admin token), client_id (required when token is dashboard_token) }. Returns top-3-per-category scripts ranked by Claude Sonnet 4.5 against lead + niche context.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929', max_tokens: 2000, temperature: 0.2, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

nodes.name: Claude Rank Scripts
nodes.notes: TODO: Bind 'Anthropic API' credential (HTTP Header Auth, header x-api-key with value $ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). No credentials block yet — will fall through to baseline rank when unbound.
